{{Infobox concept
| name = Keeper virus
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Keeper virus]] becomes more aggressive in response to [[Aila]]'s accelerated healing.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13">''The Pilot'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Keeper virus]] is believed to have been engineered by an [[Aether Technician]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Keeper virus]] must be manually reapplied and cannot exist in the wild.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c17">''The Pilot'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
